taxonomy: Scolopacium incarnatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda. The classification of Scolopacium incarnatum includes its genus, Scolopacium, and its family, Thymelaeaceae. The plant's classification is further detailed into its kingdom, Plantae, and its higher classification into the subkingdom Angiosperm and the division Magnoliophyta. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and its place within the plant kingdom.
